name: Brainboard Cloud Infrastructure Design API
what_it_does: Cloud infrastructure design platform with REST API that generates Terraform code from visual architecture diagrams — teams draw cloud architectures visually and Brainboard generates production-ready Terraform, with bi-directional sync between diagrams and code.
use_cases: Generating Terraform infrastructure code from architecture specifications via API
Managing cloud architecture designs as code with version control integration
Exporting infrastructure templates as Terraform for CI/CD pipeline consumption
Creating cloud architecture diagrams from Terraform code for documentation
Managing multi-cloud architecture designs across teams programmatically
not_for: Teams that prefer pure code-first IaC without visual tooling
Non-Terraform IaC users — Brainboard generates Terraform specifically
Simple single-resource deployments without architecture complexity
best_when: An infrastructure team needs to design cloud architectures visually while generating accurate Terraform code, bridging the gap between architecture and implementation.
avoid_when: You prefer code-first IaC workflow — Brainboard's visual-first approach adds overhead for pure code teams.

auth.notes: API key for programmatic access. OAuth2 for SSO integration with enterprise identity providers. Organization-scoped tokens. Team access controls for architecture management.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter $49/month (5 architectures, 3 users); Team $149/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Architecture-based pricing. Enterprise includes SSO, RBAC, and advanced CI/CD integration. Unique positioning as Terraform-generating visual design tool.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; Terraform generation may take seconds for complex designs

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API documented for architecture and Terraform export operations. Less comprehensive documentation than competitors. Error responses are JSON. Webhook delivery for design events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Architecture reads and exports are idempotent. Architecture creation is idempotent by name. Terraform generation from same design is deterministic.
known_agent_gotchas: Visual design must be created in UI first — API cannot create designs from scratch
Terraform generation quality depends on how well components are configured in UI
EU data residency — verify compliance for architectural designs containing sensitive information
Generated Terraform may need manual review for production use

security_score_components.security_notes: GDPR compliant (EU-based). OAuth2 for enterprise SSO. TLS enforced. EU data residency. Architecture diagrams may contain sensitive infrastructure details — handle accordingly.
